revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-2-135

Fresnel Profile (of a lens or fixed lens)

A stepped profile of both dioptric and catadioptric elements, the dioptric part of which presents one straight side towards the focus.

(Figs. 10, 14 and 16)
